title: Good character requirements and police certificates :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Good character requirements and police certificates
To get a visa, you must meet good character requirements. This includes providing us with correct and complete information. To prove your good character you may need to provide us with police certificates.
- Character requirements for New Zealand visas To be given a New Zealand visa, you must be of good character. If you have a criminal history, have provided false or misleading information, or could be a risk to New Zealand, we can decline your application.

## Character requirements for New Zealand visas
To be given a New Zealand visa, you must be of good character. If you have a criminal history, have provided false or misleading information, or could be a risk to New Zealand, we can decline your application.
- Police certificates When you apply for a visa, you may need to provide us with a police certificate to show that you are of good character.
When you apply for a visa, you may need to provide us with a police certificate to show that you are of good character.
- How to get a police certificate You may need to supply us with a police certificate as evidence of your good character. This tool shows you how to get a police certificate from a specific country.

## How to get a police certificate
You may need to supply us with a police certificate as evidence of your good character. This tool shows you how to get a police certificate from a specific country.
